subsection.name: Description
subsection.div: Check that a private field is declared, but never used. Fields with any other visibility (package-private, protected, or public), including those declared in an implicitly declared class (compact source file), are not checked.

tr.td: Specify annotations canonical names which ignore variables in consideration.

Specify field names to ignore, even if they otherwise satisfy this check's detection of an unused private field. Note this replaces the default value entirely — to keep serialVersionUID ignored alongside your own names, include it explicitly.

subsection.name: Examples
subsection.p: To configure the check to allow UnusedPrivateField with annotation:
To configure the check to allow UnusedPrivateField with FieldNames:

subsection.name: Violation Messages
subsection.p: All messages can be customized if the default message doesn't suit you. Please see the documentation to learn how to.

subsection.name: Fully Qualified Name
subsection.p: Use this fully qualified class name in configuration when an exact class reference is required.
